queries.name: Semantic Content Discovery - Thematic Similarity
queries.original_error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)
queries.final_error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)

fix_history.error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)
fix_history.esql:
FROM content_catalog METADATA _score
| WHERE MATCH(description, "complex family dynamics with moral ambiguity and redemption arc")
  AND availability == "On-demand"
| KEEP content_id, _score, title, themes, genre, narrative_complexity, tone
| SORT _score DESC
| LIMIT 15

fix_history.error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)
fix_history.esql:
FROM content_catalog
| WHERE narrative_complexity IN ("Complex", "Very Complex")
  AND tone IN ("Gritty", "Dark", "Intense")
| EVAL theme_match = CASE(
    themes LIKE "*Family dynamics*" OR themes LIKE "*Moral ambiguity*" OR themes LIKE "*Redemption arc*", 1, 0)
| WHERE theme_match == 1
| KEEP content_id, title, themes, genre, narrative_complexity, tone
| SORT narrative_complexity DESC, tone DESC
| LIMIT 15

fix_history.error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)
fix_history.esql:
FROM content_catalog
| WHERE narrative_complexity IN ("Complex", "Very Complex")
  AND tone IN ("Gritty", "Dark", "Intense")
  AND (themes LIKE "*Family dynamics*" OR themes LIKE "*Moral ambiguity*" OR themes LIKE "*Redemption arc*")
| KEEP content_id, title, themes, genre, narrative_complexity, tone
| SORT narrative_complexity DESC, tone DESC
| LIMIT 15

queries.name: Cold Start Content Discovery - Thematic Expansion

queries.final_error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)

fix_history.esql:
FROM content_themes METADATA _score
| WHERE MATCH(theme_description, "coming of age self discovery identity")
| MV_EXPAND related_themes
| LOOKUP JOIN content_catalog ON related_themes == themes
| KEEP content_id, _score, title, theme_name, related_themes, genre, narrative_complexity
| SORT _score DESC
| LIMIT 12

queries.name: User Preference Analysis with Theme Affinity
queries.original_error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)
queries.final_error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)

fix_history.error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)
fix_history.esql:
FROM user_preferences
| WHERE profile_maturity == "Cold Start"
| MV_EXPAND liked_themes
| STATS 
    user_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(user_id),
    avg_sessions = AVG(session_count),
    theme_popularity = COUNT(*)
  BY liked_themes
| WHERE user_count > 5
| SORT theme_popularity DESC
| LIMIT 20

queries.name: Negative Signal Detection - Skip and Dismissal Patterns
queries.original_error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)
queries.final_error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)

fix_history.error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)
fix_history.esql:
FROM viewing_history
| WHERE skipped == true OR dismissed == true
| WHERE completion_percentage < 0.2
| STATS 
    skip_count = COUNT(*),
    avg_watch_duration = AVG(watch_duration_seconds),
    unique_users = COUNT_DISTINCT(user_id)
  BY content_id
| WHERE skip_count > 10
| LOOKUP JOIN content_catalog ON content_id
| KEEP content_id, title, genre, themes, skip_count, avg_watch_duration, unique_users
| SORT skip_count DESC
| LIMIT 25

queries.name: Content Performance by Narrative Complexity
queries.original_error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)
queries.final_error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)

fix_history.error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)
fix_history.esql:
FROM viewing_history
| WHERE completion_percentage > 0.7
| LOOKUP JOIN content_catalog ON content_id
| STATS 
    view_count = COUNT(*),
    avg_completion = AVG(completion_percentage),
    avg_rating = AVG(rating_given),
    unique_viewers = COUNT_DISTINCT(user_id)
  BY narrative_complexity, genre
| WHERE view_count > 20
| EVAL engagement_score = TO_DOUBLE(avg_completion) * avg_rating
| SORT engagement_score DESC
| LIMIT 30

queries.name: Theme Relationship Network Analysis
queries.original_error: Query returned 0 results (constraints may be too restrictive)

fix_history.esql:
FROM content_themes
| MV_EXPAND related_themes
| STATS 
    relationship_count = COUNT(*),
    unique_parent_themes = COUNT_DISTINCT(parent_theme)
  BY related_themes, emotional_tone
| WHERE relationship_count > 5
| SORT relationship_count DESC
| LIMIT 25
